message:
test(integration): add 24 cross-crate runtime integration tests (ft-e34d9.10.6.3)

End-to-end tests validating cross-module contracts across the runtime stack:

- SLO evaluation pipeline: standard SLOs → healthy/breached samples → Pass/ConditionalPass/Fail
- Health checks → RuntimeDoctorReport with proper status counts
- Cross-crate scenario coverage: boundaries, categories, and gap detection
- Performance contract: standard operations, critical ops, threshold comparison
- Diagnostic catalog → rendering → certification pipeline for all 10 failure classes
- Telemetry snapshot → health tier derivation (Green/Red/Black)
- Full telemetry → SLO sample → gate verdict pipeline
- Cross-module: failure class links between diagnostics, SLOs, and alert policy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
